form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 42-day let-up. Most recently 4th in a small field at this track on February 28 over 1207m, 11 len behind Manseeyasway with 52kg at $8.60. Before that settled back and ran on when 4th of 7 at this track on February 6 over 1609m, 18 len behind Albert Finnigan carrying 52kg at $16. Better than that recent lacklustre performance suggests.
